title: Cornmeal Tagine Cakes with Algerian Spice
description: A twist on traditional tagine, these crispy cornmeal cakes are infused with the warm spices of Algeria. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, Algerian spice, salt, and flour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, water, and olive oil.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the chopped tagine and tender.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into balls and flatten slightly into patties.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
